title: Parley: A Privacy-Preserving Age Verification Protocol
description: Normative specification of the Parley zero knowledge age verification protocol. Specifies cryptographic constructions (Groth16 over BLS12-381, Pedersen commitments, RedJubjub credential signatures, Ed25519 issuer attestations, Blake2s-256 and SHA-256 hashing, PKCE session binding), wire formats, and protocol flows for issuance, proof generation, and verification. Implementations conforming to this specification are interoperable across the issuance, proof, and verification roles.

creators.name: Maelstrom AI Pty Ltd ATF Maelstrom AI Holding Trust

references: Hopwood, D. et al., 'Zcash Protocol Specification', Version 2022.3.8 [NU5 proofs].
Saarinen, M.-J., Aumasson, J.-P., 'The BLAKE2 Cryptographic Hash and Message Authentication Code (MAC)', RFC 7693, November 2015.
Josefsson, S., Liusvaara, I., 'Edwards-Curve Digital Signature Algorithm (EdDSA)', RFC 8032, January 2017.
Sakimura, N. et al., 'Proof Key for Code Exchange by OAuth Public Clients', RFC 7636, September 2015.
notes: Australian Provisional Patent Application No. 2026901546, filed 26 February 2026 by Maelstrom AI Pty Ltd. Royalty-free licence granted to any person implementing this specification under the terms set out in the document's Copyright and Licence Notice, with defensive termination against litigants.
